name: Backblaze, Inc.
summary: Part I Overview We are a high-performance cloud storage platform for data-intensive use cases in the artificial intelligence (AI) era and across a broad range of modern cloud workloads, designed to help customers address complex storage needs by reducing the barriers of lock-in, complexity, and cost. Our mission is to make customers succeed by solving their toughest data storage challenges.
